race.comment: FIRERATED (3) wasn't far away fresh at Cranbourne over 1000m when firmly in the market. He'll be fitter and draws for a nice run up on top of the speed. Without a whole lot of pressure and up to 1100m, he should take catching. GODTFRED KIRK (2) resumes, now with the Reece Goodwin yard having shown early ability with the Freedmans. 1100m is on the sharp side but he can be charging late. OFF THEIR PERCH (7) resumes. She didn't manage a win in three runs last campaign but was thereabouts in some decent races and should be hard to hold out. BARK (4) struggled last time here on heavy going, the Moe maiden win prior was dominant and he can bounce back.
